fps_counter_s(3) Library Functions Manual fps_counter_s(3)

NAME

fps_counter_s - FPS counter state.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


uint64_t frame_times [30]
Circular buffer of timestamps (ns). int head
Current write position (0 to FPS_WINDOW_SIZE-1). int count
Number of valid entries in buffer (0 to FPS_WINDOW_SIZE).

Detailed Description

FPS counter state.

Maintains a circular buffer of frame timestamps for rolling-window FPS calculation.

Definition at line 23 of file fps_counter.c.

Field Documentation

int fps_counter_s::count

Number of valid entries in buffer (0 to FPS_WINDOW_SIZE).

Definition at line 26 of file fps_counter.c.

Referenced by fps_counter_create(), fps_counter_get(), and fps_counter_tick().
